title: docs: update deployment-location docs and skills for flux on Vast.ai
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Follow-up to #12171 — updates the deployment-location docs/skills that still said flux runs on RunPod.

- monitor-services skill: adds §8 Flux on Vast.ai (health check, pool-vs-Fireworks split via worker log, restart); fixes description, procedure step, SSH-keys note, example output
- rotation README + `rotate-infra-gpu-token.sh`: marks the Flux+Z-Image leg STALE (pod `hsl3ksl31lvrcc` terminated) with pointers to current topology — script needs rework before next rotation
- provider-billing runpod doc: flux no longer on RunPod
- GPU_INSTANCES.md: removes dead `SSH_RUNPOD_FLUX_ZIMAGE` row, adds Vast key, marks flux-vast-02 as stopped spare

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Mapping the new Vast.ai territory
gist.blurb: Updated our internal maps and Claude skills to reflect Flux's new home on Vast.ai.
gist.summary: Updated internal documentation, rotation scripts, and Claude skills to reflect that Flux image generation now runs on Vast.ai instead of RunPod.
gist.impact: Internal tools and AI agents now have the correct SSH keys, health check procedures, and topology maps for managing the Vast.ai Flux instances.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot updating a map or reading a manual. The map shows a new island or server rack labeled 'Vast.ai', representing the infrastructure migration documentation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot looking at a glowing digital map. The map shows a new server island labeled 'Vast.ai'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
